sections.label: Bio:
sections.content: Finding light in what feels impossible is what drives my work. The challenge isn't avoiding difficulty, it's looking at it from another direction to recognize the hidden opportunity. That's how I approach design. I don't settle when something feels stuck. I reframe it. I refine it. I work until confusion becomes clarity and obstacles become opportunities.

sections.label: Education:
sections.content: BFA from ArtCenter College of Design
